  "fixed_xml": "<ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>groß 8vo.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> ohngebunden <PRIZE>6. Rappen,</PRIZE> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</BIBL></ITEM>",

2) Replaced malformed character sequence in "gro√üc 8v√≤." with normalized text "groß 8vo." inside <FORMAT>.
3) Replaced malformed character sequence "8v√≤." with "8vo." in "Memoires de Rochester" <FORMAT>.
4) Replaced malformed character sequence "8v√≤." with "8vo." in "Anfäng der Geographie" <FORMAT>.
5) Replaced malformed character sequence "8v√≤." with "8vo." in "Messung des Meridians Gradus" <FORMAT>.
6) Replaced malformed character sequence "8v√≤." with "8vo." in "Satura pars II." <FORMAT>.
7) Replaced malformed character sequence in "Anf√§ng" with "Anfäng" in <TITLE>.
8) Replaced malformed character sequence in "Gespr√§ch" with "Gespräch" in <TITLE>.
9) Replaced malformed character sequence in "W√ºrmen" with "Würmern" in <TITLE>.
10) Removed stray symbol "√†" after "Schlotz" (non-XML-content OCR artifact).
11) Standardized incorrect tag <PRICE>...</PRICE> to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> for consistency with the rest of the document."
